filesystem.description: Read/write files across the WalletDNA project — shared by all agents

fetch.description: HTTP requests — test Helius, Alchemy, and other blockchain APIs directly

github.description: GitHub — manage PRs, issues, branches for WalletDNA repo

postgres.description: Direct PostgreSQL access — query wallet profiles, users, API keys (requires Docker running)

redis.description: Redis — inspect cache, rate limit counters, queue state (requires Docker running)

intel.description: Free intelligence scraping — Twitter (Nitter RSS), Reddit, Farcaster, RSS feeds. No API keys.

memory.description: Knowledge graph persistent memory — entities, relations, cross-session learning. No API key needed.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning — use for architecture decisions, algorithm design, complex debugging.

playwright.description: Real browser automation — scrape JS-heavy sites, blockchain explorers, wallet dashboards. No screenshots needed.

exa.description: Exa neural web search — best for technical/crypto research queries. Requires EXA_API_KEY.
